bead.title: agent-power-contract: consume upstream requested-power interface
bead.description:
<context-digest>FEAT-006 now defines a MinPower/MaxPower DDx/agent boundary with passthrough constraints. DDx requests abstract agent power bounds and may pass harness/provider/model constraints unchanged; agent owns model/provider routing and reports actual model/power. This bead consumes the upstream agent release that exposes Execute MinPower/MaxPower, passthrough constraints, response actual model/power, and model/power catalog.</context-digest>
Pull and wire the upstream ddx-agent power-bounds + passthrough interface into DDx types/config/test seams.
bead.acceptance:
1. cli/go.mod pins an agent version exposing MinPower, MaxPower, and Harness/Provider/Model passthrough on ExecuteRequest/ServiceExecuteRequest.
2. Execute results/events expose actual_model and actual_power.
3. Agent status/catalog API exposes available models with power numbers.
4. DDx compile-time adapters build against the new fields without using profile aliases or route decisions.
5. CHANGELOG or migration note references the consumed upstream MinPower/MaxPower passthrough contract.
